## **ER1.3.  SECTION 3 -- REGULATORY RESULT**

### **ER1.3.1. DSNA NET GAIN/LOSS ON ACTIVITY IN THE FRANCE EN ROUTE CHARGING ZONE IN 2025**

DSNA reported a net loss of -2.7 M€, as a combination of a loss of -28.3 M€ arising from the cost sharing mechanism, with a gain of +32.5 M€ arising from the traffic risk sharing mechanism and a loss of -6.9 M€ relating to financial incentives.

### **ER1.3.2. DSNA OVERALL REGULATORY RESULT (RR) FOR THE EN ROUTE ACTIVITY**

Ex-post, the overall RR, taking into account the net loss from the en route activity mentioned above (-2.7 M€) and the actual RoE (+30.8 M€), amounts to +28.1 M€ (2.0% of the en route revenues). The resulting ex-post rate of return on equity is 12.1%, which is higher than the 10.5% planned in the PP.

### **ER1.3.3. NOTES** 

#### **ER1.3.3.1. NOTE 1**

#### **ER1.3.3.2. NOTE 2**

# **TZ1. TERMINAL CHARGING ZONE - FRANCE ZONE 1**
